content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Wonderdog: Full-Stack Product Engineer - Agentic First Anywhere in the World 🇨🇦 Canada and 🇺🇸 United States of America Alabama Full-Stack Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5766/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Los Angeles <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://wonderdoghealth.com/">https://wonderdoghealth.com/</a> </p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Wonder Dog is a preventative health platform for dogs. We send licensed vet techs to your home for a blood draw, run a 40+ biomarker panel through a national lab, and turn the results into something owners can actually act on. We're a small team with paying customers, and you'd be working directly with the founder and our lead engineer.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>How we work</strong></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">AI coding agents do most of the typing here. Your job is to direct them, review the output, and make sure what ships is right. You pick up a ticket, ship it, verify it, and move on. Few meetings, no ceremony.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>What you'll do</strong></p> <ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3"> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Ship customer-facing features end to end: UI, API, database</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Work a prioritized backlog across checkout, booking, onboarding, and mobile</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Own quality. If it's not tested and working, it's not done</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Tell us when we're wrong. We'd rather hear it early</li> </ul> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>You're probably a fit if</strong></p> <ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3"> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">You've shipped full-stack TypeScript products that people paid for</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">AI agents are already how you work, not something you're curious about</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">You like autonomy and hate process for its own sake</li> </ul> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal"><strong>To apply</strong></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal">Send us something you shipped recently, resume &amp; github link&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wonderdog-full-stack-product-engineer-agentic-first">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wonderdog-full-stack-product-engineer-agentic-first</a></p> Thu, 09 Jul 2026 17:03:38 +0000 Sat, 08 Aug 2026 17:03:38 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wonderdog-full-stack-product-engineer-agentic-first https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/wonderdog-full-stack-product-engineer-agentic-first Forward Push Law Firm Marketing: Marketing Quality Lead Anywhere in the World Georgia Copywriting, Digital Marketing, Problem Solving, Quality Assurance, SEO, Strategic Thinking, AI Content Creation, Large Language Models (LLMs), Branding, Content Creation, Strategic Planning, Content Strategy, Technical SEO, Editing, Social Media Content, Proofreading, and AI Agents Sales and Marketing Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/2071/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://forwardpush.com/">https://forwardpush.com/</a> </p> <h2>About Forward Push</h2> <p>Forward Push is a law firm marketing agency that has been in the space for over 15 years. We are not a traditional agency. We build AI-powered marketing systems that deliver real, measurable results for law firms. No vanity metrics. No fluff. Just leads, growth, and outcomes that matter.</p> <p>We are a small, remote team building something bigger than ourselves, a company where the people inside it, from team members to clients, have the opportunity to achieve real financial and professional freedom. We are in the middle of a significant growth phase, and every person we bring on is a critical piece of that.</p> <p>We experiment boldly, learn quickly, and celebrate wins together. If you are excited about the intersection of AI and marketing and want to be part of a team that is actually building the future of how agencies operate, you will fit right in.</p> <h2>The Role</h2> <p>We are hiring a Marketing Quality Lead, the person standing between our AI agent system and the world.</p> <p>Our content is produced by a team of AI agents: social media posts, blog articles, press releases, videos, ad copy, and more. These agents are powerful, fast, and increasingly capable. But they are not perfect. They drift. They get things wrong. They produce content that looks right but isn’t quite right.</p> <p>Your job is to catch it before it goes live.</p> <p>You are not just a proofreader. You are a marketing professional who understands strategy, quality, and brand. Someone who understands how AI works well enough to correct it, coach it, and make it better over time. You are the quality gate that our clients depend on and the feedback loop that makes our entire system smarter.</p> <h2>What You’ll Do</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Review all AI-generated content before publication, such as social media posts, blog articles, press releases, video scripts, ad copy, graphics, and more.</p> </li> <li> <p>Evaluate content against each client’s strategy, not just for grammar and formatting, but for whether it actually serves their goals.</p> </li> <li> <p>Catch and correct issues: keyword stuffing, off-brand messaging, AI-generated images that look artificial, and captions that don’t match the content.</p> </li> <li> <p>Send feedback directly back to the agent. Clearly documenting what went wrong and why, so the agent learns and improves.</p> </li> <li> <p>Own the publish button. Nothing goes live without your approval.</p> </li> <li> <p>Monitor what’s happening in AI and marketing: New tools, new best practices, new risks,&nbsp; and bring relevant insights back to the team.</p> </li> <li> <p>Work closely with our Content &amp; Systems Manager to continuously improve agent documentation, SOPs, and performance.</p> </li> </ul> <h2>What We’re Looking For</h2> <h3>Must
